hook.text: UNITED WANT TONALI IN RECORD DEAL

beats.text: NEWCASTLE VALUE TONALI AT £100M — AGENTS SHOPPING HIM
UNITED LEAD ARSENAL AND CITY IN TONALI RACE
NEWCASTLE EXPECT A SALE — UNITED READY TO MATCH THE FEE
TONALI WOULD COMPLETE CARRICK'S MIDFIELD OVERHAUL

caption: Reports say United are ahead of Arsenal and City in the race for Sandro Tonali — Newcastle value the Italian at £100m and 'expect' a sale as his agent shops him around. United are reportedly ready to match the fee, which would smash their transfer record. Carrick has already agreed Ederson and is chasing Mateus Fernandes — Tonali would be the third midfield piece 🔴 Do you want Tonali at Old Trafford? RUMOUR — per Planet Football / The Telegraph.
